intent: Replace minimal task list with flagship Charmbracelet TUI. Tasks as rich cards with subtask expansion — the primary screen users interact with.
hypotheses: H1: Bubble Tea list.Model with custom ItemDelegate renders cards efficiently — HIGH
H2: Subtask expansion via toggle state per card with nested rendering — HIGH
H3: Lip Gloss adaptive coloring for status accents across terminal themes — MEDIUM
constraints: Must use existing .doey/tasks/*.task and *.json file format — no schema changes
Bubble Tea / Lip Gloss / Bubbles only — no external TUI deps
Cards must render correctly in 80-col terminals
Subtask data from .task SUBTASKS field and .json subtasks array
success_criteria: Task list shows cards with title, status badge, type, tags, description preview, subtask progress bar
Status-colored accents: green=done, yellow=active, blue=pending, red=error
Cards have Lip Gloss borders, padding, selection highlight
Smooth scrolling through 20+ tasks without glitches
Decision logs and notes accessible from expanded card view
deliverables: tui/components/subtask/ — subtask list and expansion component
Updated tui/views/tasks/ — card-based list replacing current
tui/styles/cards.go — Lip Gloss card styles, status colors, selection states
Keyboard: j/k navigate, enter expand, tab subtasks, esc collapse, ? help

phases.title: Card foundation and list view
phases.brief: Build TaskCard component with custom list.ItemDelegate. Cards show title, status badge, type tag, description preview (2-line truncated), subtask count. Lip Gloss borders with status-colored left accent. Selection state with inverted/highlighted rendering. Replace current task list view. Smooth scroll with 20+ cards.

phases.title: Subtask system and card expansion
phases.brief: Enter key toggles card expansion showing: full description, subtask checklist with completion state, progress bar, decision log entries, notes. Tab cycles subtasks. Checkbox + title + status per subtask. Nested indentation. Viewport scrolling for long content.

phases.title: Visual polish and integration
phases.brief: Keyboard help overlay (?), smooth expand/collapse transitions, adaptive 80-col width, consistent color theme, empty-state messaging, filter/sort hints in footer. Integration test with real .doey/tasks/ data. Build verification.
